desc: add_item reuses the same default list across calls, causing unintended state leakage between callers.
append_global mutates and returns a shared module-level list, coupling callers through persistent mutable state.
risky_division catches every Exception and returns None, masking unrelated programming and runtime errors.
inconsistent_return returns either an integer or a string for the same conceptual value, forcing error-prone type handling by callers.
The module-level list comprehension executes prints during import and allocates a useless list containing three None values.
run_code passes its input directly to eval, allowing arbitrary code execution whenever code_str is attacker-controlled.
